title: Galarian Slowking Battle Guide
summary: A [Poison]/[Psychic] special tank with [regenerator] and the signature [eerie-spell] — drains 3 PP from the target's last move for hyper-disruption.
strengths: [eerie-spell] drains 3 PP from the target's last move
110 SpA and 110 SpD are extremely balanced
weaknesses: Speed 30 is [trick-room] or slow pivot only
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Galarian Slowking is a special-oriented [Poison]/[Psychic] tank built around [regenerator] and its signature move [eerie-spell]. The latter drains 3 PP from the opponent's last-used move — a rare disruption tool that cripples [choice-specs] or [choice-band] attackers by burning through their main attacking move.

## Strengths
[regenerator] combined with [slack-off] creates effectively infinite HP. [eerie-spell] at 80 BP plus 3 PP drain is the strongest disruption move in the game — Choice item users can be neutralized in two or three hits. 110 SpA and 110 SpD are a perfect offensive/defensive hybrid stat line for a bulky special attacker.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[Ground], [Ghost], [Psychic], and [Dark] are all common meta weaknesses. Speed 30 forces slow pivot play or [trick-room] cores. Physical bulk is average, so it primarily tanks special hits.

## Recommended Moveset
[eerie-spell] is the signature STAB. [sludge-bomb] adds [Poison] STAB and poison chance. [slack-off] is mandatory for sustain. [protect] is standard doubles utility.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[assault-vest] is the default — it turns Galarian Slowking into an extreme special wall. [black-sludge] is a leftovers alternative specific to [Poison] types. [regenerator] is locked. Tera [Poison] or [Psychic] stacks STAB and shifts defensive typing.

## Teammates & Synergy
Fits slow-pivot or [trick-room] cores. Cover [Ground] and [Ghost] weaknesses with [Flying] and [Dark] partners. Pair with other [regenerator] users like Galarian Slowbro for a durability-focused core.

## Play Patterns
Switch in on a predicted special attack, click [eerie-spell] to drain PP from the target's Choice-locked move, then pivot out to heal with [regenerator]. Use [sludge-bomb] for damage pressure and [slack-off] when a switch isn't safe.
